Created attachment 154485
games/tome4 1.2.5 -> 1.3.0

Please update games/tome4 to 1.3.0. This is a huge release with
paradox system being completely reworked, a new (no spoilers here) playable race, lots of shiny eyecandy, many UI improvements and bugfixes.

Announcement:
http://te4.org/blogs/darkgod/2015/03/news/tales-majeyal-130-aka-dust-dust-released
